_comment: Claude Code hook registrations for the hydra-dev skill (issue #671). sync-skills.sh copies this file to ~/.claude/skills/hydra-dev/.claude/settings.json. The PostToolUse hook classifies every tool call into milestone/io/background and XADDs a subagent_tool_call event onto hydra:autopilot:slot-events. The hook script lives in the orchestrator repo at scripts/autopilot/hooks/on-subagent-tool-call.sh — path is absolute so the harness can find it regardless of subagent cwd.
